{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19336661?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sm1ee", "id": 19336661, "login": "sm1ee", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5MzM2NjYx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44792", "cvss": {"score": 9.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "## Impact
An attacker with write access to the git repository connected to an n8n Source Control configuration could commit a malicious Data Table JSON file containing a crafted column name. When an administrator performed a Source Control Pull, n8n imported the file and could lead to SQL injection on the internal PostgreSQL instance.

Exploitation requires all of the following conditions:
- The n8n instance uses PostgreSQL as its database backend.
- The Source Control feature is enabled and connected to a repository the attacker can write to.
- An administrator triggers a Source Control Pull.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n version 1.123.43, 2.20.7, and 2.21.1. Users should upgrade to this version or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Disable the Source Control feature if it is not actively required.
- Restrict write access to the connected git repository to fully trusted users only.
- Avoid pulling from repositories that may have been modified by untrusted parties.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00331, "percentile": 0.24826}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T16:18:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44792"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T17:16:59Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T16:18:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44792", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n Has a Source Control Pull SQL Injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:41:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mhrx-qhrj-673w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.43", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.43"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.21.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.21.0, < 2.21.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.20.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.20.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n Has a Source Control Pull SQL Injection
